productDisplayName: Vans Men Bali Brown Casual Shoes
description: Want to display to the world your impeccable English style? Look no further than these awesome slip-on shoes from vans. Lovely soft English tweed, comfortable Fit and a stylish round toed shape add up to a casual shoe a little ahead of the pack. Wear these with trouser and shirt to tone down a formal outfit, or wear with casual shorts and T-shirt to add a funky, cool style to your relaxed look. Upper Tweed fabric uppers for durability and comfort Textile lining for extra comfort Elasticated gores on the sides of the tongue for easy insertion and removal of the feet Brand name on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
